case_title: YVETTE NAROG VS. THE METROPOLITAN ASSOCIATION

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY NAROG, YVETTE AS TO DEFENDANT THE METROPOLITAN ASSOCIATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-11-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-11-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-11-2019 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF YVETT NAROG IS PRESENT. WITNESS CORY NAROG APPEARED. DEFENDANT IS PRESENT METROPOLITAN ASSOCIATION REPRESENTED BY STEPHANNIE SCHWARTZ-MILLER GEN MANAGER. DEFENDANT IS PRESENT METROPOLITAN ASSOCIATION REPRESENTED BY MICHAEL ALFARO AGENT.
